first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions identify the exact same strengths (full-stack skills, open-source work) and weaknesses (lack of C++, industrial automation, and specific security standards). The minor differences in wording and the reordering of concerns are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any new reasoning tied to the change in location from Berlin to Lagos.
